name: Lentil Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lentils, onion, garlic, and wine in a pot.
2. Simmer for three minutes over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and stir in basil, thyme, parsley, lemon juice, and oil until well combined.
4. Add tomato wedges and lettuce leaves to serve on lettuce leaves.
